title.description: Dzina la pulogalamu likuwonetsedwa pa mutu. Pulogalamu ya kupeza mapangidwe a chakudya cha dziko lonse.

subtitle.text: Pezani mapangidwe a chakudya kuchokera padziko lonse
subtitle.description: Malemba omwe amawonetsedwa pansi pa dzina la pulogalamu pa mutu.

heroTitle.description: Mutu waukulu pa gawo la tsamba loyamba.

heroSubtitle.text: Sankhani mapangidwe enieni kuchokera m'nyumba zosiyanasiyana padziko lonse
heroSubtitle.description: Malemba owerengera oonekera pansi pa mutu waukulu pa tsamba loyamba.

featuredTitle.description: Mutu wa gawo likuwonetsedwa pamwamba pa grid ya makadi a mapangidwe.

cookingTime.description: Malemba a nthawi yophikira pa kadikadi ka mapangidwe. {minutes} imasinthidwa ndi chiwerengero cha mphindi.

difficulty.description: Malemba omwe amawonetsedwa pamaso pa mulingo wa zovuta pa kadikadi ka mapangidwe.

easy.description: Mulingo wa zovuta ukuwonetsa mapangidwe osavuta.

medium.description: Mulingo wa zovuta ukuwonetsa mapangidwe ovuta pang'ono.

hard.description: Mulingo wa zovuta ukuwonetsa mapangidwe ovuta.

label.description: Dzina lopezeka kwa wosankha chilankhulo mu chikwatu cha mutu.

en.description: Kusankha chilankhulo cha Chingerezi mu wosankha chilankhulo.

ja.description: Kusankha chilankhulo cha Chijapani mu wosankha chilankhulo.

es.description: Kusankha chilankhulo cha Chisipanishi mu wosankha chilankhulo.
